comment: Phase-2 data-validity exclusions. The collected b2..b16 runs used the suites generated BEFORE commit 9a69fc8 (b2: commit a862b73 era; b4/b8/b16: commit 88ca7b0): a sentence-splitter bug had put abbreviation fragments of 'A surgeon, Dr. Smith, entered the room.' into the ballast pool, and severed case 1085. claude b16 additionally lost 22 cases to an Anthropic credit outage (no API response at all). Analyses should drop these case ids.
